text.message: Giving oj wood is not great
How in the world is the block not blue?
other than he may not have wanted wood
Still...can't leave you unchecked when you're worlds ahead of us all
I just don't get that block and steal
And now oj is gonna dev like crazy
Yeah, would rather give you the trade than blue
orange red is ahead of me at this point
i burned hot and fast now i am stuck
But I think it's too late anyways
He has the open settle I can't plow
